name: Sounds 2 Sounds
description: A remote expedition between two of New Zealand's most spectacular coastlines.
text1: Cross the South Island from the Marlborough Sounds to Milford Sound with this route created by Jonathan Kennett and Bronwen Wall. . Along the way, Sounds 2 Sounds links the Whale Trail (new track!), the Molesworth station, Alps 2 Ocean and Lake Dunstan trails, plus many quiet backcountry roads. With nearly twice the height of Everest in total climbing, this is a journey big in landscapesa and hard-earned views.
text2: The character of the route changes constantly as it moves south: coastal riding gives way to the immense high-country spaces of Molesworth, the turquoise lakes of the Mackenzie Basin and the dramatic mountains and river valleys of Central Otago and Fiordland. Like riding through a greatest-hits of the South Island.
text3: Resupply is straightforward in many places, but some remote sections require several days of food, careful accommodation planning and flexibility around weather or track conditions.
